KLV Photography is a professional wedding photographer based in Los Angeles, California. Specializing in capturing authentic, emotional moments, KLV Photography brings a unique artistic vision to every wedding. With 97 glowing reviews and a passion for storytelling, every image reflects the love and joy of your special day.
